Traders Manual Trading Discord Bot Round 5 Explorer
No manual trading challenge recorded for Round 1.
No manual trading challenge recorded for Round 2.
Round 3 manual trading challenge: Celestial Gardeners.

Working notebook in repo at notebooks/manual_trading_3_celestial_gardeners.ipynb.

Vanilla Just Isn’t Exotic Enough

All products written on AETHER_CRYSTAL. Trade the underlying, vanilla calls/puts at 2 and 3 weeks, and three exotics: a chooser, a binary put, and a knock-out put. Score = average PnL over 100 simulated paths.

GBM, r = 0 σ = 251% / yr 4 steps / trading day 252 trading days / yr 2w = 10 td, 3w = 15 td contract size = 3,000

How the simulation works · path visualizer

Modeld ln S = -½σ² dt + σ dW
Steps in 3w (15 td)60
dt (yr)9.92e-4
σ √dt per step7.9%
σ √T (3w horizon)61.2%
1σ S(T) range22 – 76

—
Each simulation draws an independent GBM path of the underlying with the chosen parameters and scores the board with all current orders. The displayed mean is the unbiased estimator of the score the challenge would assign.
